violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed employee putting on gloves without washing hands.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Observed bowl lids being stored on the floor at time of inspection.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Observed flooring in the back storage area was damaged at time of inspection. Observed ceiling tiles are acoustic which are not smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
